invariant_descriptions.MGV-0: MutationGenealogyAnalyzer._load() MUST never raise. Any parse failure is silently skipped. Analyzer is never blocked by corrupt ledger state.
invariant_descriptions.MGV-DETERM-0: PropertyInheritanceVector.digest MUST be deterministic: sha256(parent_epoch:child_epoch:net_improvement) with fixed 4-decimal precision. No datetime, random, or uuid4.
invariant_descriptions.MGV-PERSIST-0: MutationGenealogyAnalyzer._persist() MUST use Path.open append mode. No direct builtins.open call. Ledger is append-only; no overwrites permitted.

finding_97_001: RESOLVED — T97-MGV-04 mock target corrected: builtins.open -> runtime.innovations30.mutation_genealogy.Path.open
notes: Innovation #12 — Mutation Genealogy Visualization. PropertyInheritanceVector annotates every lineage graph edge with four fitness deltas (correctness, efficiency, governance, fitness) and a deterministic sha256 digest. MutationGenealogyAnalyzer surfaces productive_lineages(), dead_end_epochs(), and evolutionary_direction() — enabling population-genetics-level analysis of software mutation lineages. World-first: evolutionary fitness tracking at the lineage level, not the individual mutation level.
